title: Honor provider Retry-After delays
goal: Honor provider Retry-After delay hints in retry sleeps before falling back to shared jittered backoff.
completionConditions: Shared helper chooses Retry-After-derived delay when retryable provider errors include a valid retry-after hint, capped to the provider retry cap.
OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter retry loops use Retry-After-aware delay with jitter fallback.
Tests cover parsing delay hints from retryable error messages and fallback/cap behavior.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Follow-up to shared Retry-After parsing and jitter slices for issue #27. Keep scope to retry delay selection, not global limiter architecture.
